title: 151® Complete Essential Cycle Puncture Repair KIT
features: CYCLE REPAIR ESSENTIALS: 151 Puncture Repair Kit, contains all the repair essentials, vulcanising solution crayon, abrasive texture panel on box base, chalk, glue and nine assorted patch sizes.
FAST ACTING REPAIR: 151 Puncture Repair Kit, handy size, easy to use. Keep in home, shed or travel bag at room temperature for quick easy repairs.
CYCLE SAFETY: Keep a 151 Puncture Repair Kit in your all year travel pack, spare batteries for cycle lights, lock, contact info, mobile and winter gloves
ABOUT THE PRODUCT. Ready to use cycle puncture repair kit. Store at room temperature
